heading: AWS PrivateLink Rates by Region
body:
Atlas rates for using the AWS PrivateLink feature vary by region:

> **Note:** The rates listed below are in addition to what AWS (Amazon Web Services) charges
> you for each VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) interface endpoint you create. To learn more,
> see [AWS PrivateLink Pricing](https://aws.amazon.com/privatelink/pricing/).

| AWS (Amazon Web Services) region | Hourly Cost per Private Endpoint | Cost per Atlas Private Endpoint Capacity Unit |
| -------------------------------- | -------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------- |
| us-east-1 N. Virginia            | $0.0450                          | $0.0120                                       |
| us-east-2 Ohio                   | $0.0450                          | $0.0120                                       |
| us-west-1 N. California          | $0.0504                          | $0.0120                                       |
| us-west-2 Oregon                 | $0.0450                          | $0.0120                                       |
| ca-central-1 Canada              | $0.0495                          | $0.0132                                       |
| mx-central-1 Mexico City         | $0.0473                          | $0.0126                                       |
| sa-east-1 Sao Paulo              | $0.0680                          | $0.0165                                       |
| eu-north-1 Stockholm             | $0.0479                          | $0.0114                                       |
| eu-west-1 Ireland                | $0.0504                          | $0.0120                                       |
| eu-west-2 London                 | $0.0529                          | $0.0120                                       |
| eu-west-3 Paris                  | $0.0529                          | $0.0126                                       |
| eu-central-1 Frankfurt           | $0.0540                          | $0.0120                                       |
| eu-central-2 Switzerland         | $0.0594                          | $0.0132                                       |
| eu-south-1 Spain                 | $0.0504                          | $0.0160                                       |
| me-south-1 Bahrain               | $0.0554                          | $0.0132                                       |
| me-central-1 UAE                 | $0.0564                          | $0.0179                                       |
| ap-northeast-1 Tokyo             | $0.0486                          | $0.0120                                       |
| ap-northeast-2 Seoul             | $0.0450                          | $0.0120                                       |
| ap-south-1 Mumbai                | $0.0478                          | $0.0120                                       |
| ap-south-2 Hyperabad             | $0.0478                          | $0.0120                                       |
| ap-southeast-1 Singapore         | $0.0504                          | $0.0120                                       |
| ap-southeast-2 Sydney            | $0.0504                          | $0.0120                                       |
| ap-southeast-3 Melbourne         | $0.0504                          | $0.0120                                       |
| ap-east-1 Hong Kong              | $0.0554                          | $0.0132                                       |

**Azure Private Link:**

Azure Private Link

MongoDB Atlas supports private endpoints on Azure (Microsoft Azure) using the
[Azure Private Link](https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/services/private-link/)
feature.

For [dedicated clusters](manual/reference/glossary), Atlas
charges you based on your usage across the following dimensions:

- Atlas **Private Endpoint Capacity Units**: Each
  unit equals 1GB of data processed through the entire Azure Private Link.
  Both data incoming and outgoing incurs charges.

> **See Also:** [Azure Private Link Pricing](https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/pricing/details/private-link/).

> **Example:** 1 GB of data into MongoDB via Azure Private Link equals 1
> **Private Endpoint Capacity Unit** consumed ($0.03).
